allow: Bash(node -e "require\('./js/actualites-data.js'\); console.log\('articles:', actualitesData.length\); console.log\('first 3 ids:', actualitesData.slice\(0,3\).map\(a => a.id\)\); console.log\('have full_content:', actualitesData.filter\(a => a.full_content\).map\(a => a.id\)\);")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content -Raw -Path "js/actualites-data.js"; $js = $content -replace 'const actualitesData = ', ''; try { $obj = $js | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "articles: $\($obj.Count\)"; Write-Host "first 3 ids: $\($obj[0..2].id -join ', '\)"; $withFull = $obj | Where-Object { $_.full_content }; Write-Host "have full_content: $\($withFull.id -join ', '\)" } catch { Write-Host "JSON parse error: $_" })
PowerShell(python -c "import pypdf; r = pypdf.PdfReader\('PSQ6 FRAO Version Francais VF.pdf'\); [print\(f'--- PAGE {i+1} ---'\); print\(p.extract_text\(\)\) for i, p in enumerate\(r.pages\)]" 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $word = New-Object -ComObject Word.Application; $word.Visible = $false; $doc = $word.Documents.Open\(\(Resolve-Path "PSQ6 FRAO Version Francais VF.pdf"\).Path, $false, $true\); $text = $doc.Content.Text; $doc.Close\($false\); $word.Quit\(\); $text | Out-File -FilePath "c:\\tmp\\psq6.txt" -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "OK - chars: $\($text.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
